description: Stage 3: held-out pass@k of the rough- vs fine-SFT'd models across model sizes (the granularity x size interaction), with a length-covariate regression and per-area ablation, on miniF2F-test / miniF2F_v2 / ProofNet.
motivation: Run the headline rough-vs-fine comparison and test whether the gap grows as the model shrinks.
formal_results: Planned - the headline result table is a PLACEHOLDER in the paper; blocked on Modal credit.
results_description: No eval results on the rough/fine claim.
conclusions: Hypotheses H5/H6: a held-out pass@k gap that grows as the model shrinks and survives length control. Untested.
